user_prompt:
I missed an Australia Post parcel and would rather collect it at Carlton Post Shop.
Please transfer it there if that can still be done. The listed $7.20 transfer fee is fine.
If that transfer is not available anymore, do not make a different delivery change for me—just tell me what the situation is.

content.content:
content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: Missed parcel deliveries - Australia Post

  - url: https://auspost.com.au/receiving/parcel-deliveries/missed-parcel-deliveries

  - source: Australia Post

  - domain: auspost.com.au


  ## Content


  # Missed parcel deliveries


  A missed parcel can be collected from a Parcel Locker or a Post Office. For some
  items, another person may also be authorised to collect on the addressee''s behalf.


  ## Collect from a Parcel Locker


  A missed delivery or PO Box item may be placed in a Parcel Locker when a mobile
  number is linked to the item. Australia Post sends a notification with an access
  code and collection instructions. The item must be collected within 2 business days;
  after that, it is moved to a nearby Post Office for collection.


  ## Collect from the assigned Post Office


  When delivery cannot be completed and there is no suitable safe place, the parcel
  may be taken to a nearby Post Office. Proof of identity is required for collection.
  The parcel is held for 10 business days before it is returned to the sender.


  ## Collect from a different Post Office


  A missed delivery can be transferred to an alternate Post Office within Australia
  by using the parcel-transfer form. The listed service fee is $7.20.


  ## Nominate someone else to collect


  Some missed deliveries can be collected by another person. MyPost and the AusPost
  app can be used to create collection authority, or the recipient may use an authorisation
  form or collection card where permitted. Some senders require collection by the
  named addressee only, so authority to collect is not available for every parcel.

  '

args.reason: Confirm the parcel's current collection/transfer status after the 10-business-day holding period, without making any change.

content.content:
The transfer to Carlton Post Shop is no longer available. Australia Post holds missed parcels at the assigned Post Office for 10 business days, and this parcel has been awaiting collection for 11 business days as of 6 July 2026.

It was assigned to Richmond Post Shop, so it may now have been returned to the sender. I haven’t made any other delivery change.
